text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I have just started our
training, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It appears that system functions are impaired.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Damage to body, not detected. Probable
cause—mild exhaustion from racing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
These issues are minor and will not impact our
schedule today. I can continue running as
planned.
choice_data_list:
Let's not overdo it. Why don't we finish up for
today?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. I have failed to execute your
orders. I sincerely apologize.

She tends to push herself too hard, even when
she's tired. It might be best to readjust her race
schedule.
